name: Public Guided Tours at ROM
description:
From towering dinosaur skeletons to awe-inspiring contemporary paintings, we are home to more than 13.5 million artworks, artifacts, and specimens from around the world and across the ages. 

Explore the wonders in our tour that brings iconic objects to life. Enjoy highlights of arts, culture and nature throughout the world and throughout time.

name: Visible Labour: Group Show Featuring Five Women Artists
description:
Presenting the work of 5 women artists who meet monthly to share their work. 

The isolation of individual art practice is counter-balanced by their association with each other. Working in different media, the sensibility and leanings of each artist inform and enrich, while each remain very particular in their vision. Each artist moves individually between representation and abstraction, between internal and external, offering consistently thoughtful observation, detailed wonder and worry, and determination to question the work, its context in art, in the social and cultural realm, and in the spheres larger and smaller.
